'''''Gallant''''' was a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] that saw service with the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] and later in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
The ship first saw action at the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] as a part of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Roan Shryne]]'s attack force during the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|Battle of Murkhana]]. It continued to serve in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], and saw service during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
